name: Broccoli Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 8 oz jar processed cheddar cheese spread
1 can Ro-Tel tomatoes with green chilies
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice and cook the broccoli until slightly tender; drain.
2. Heat the remaining ingredients separately.
3. Combine the heated ingredients with the cooked broccoli.
4. Place the mixture in a fondue pot to keep warm.
5. Serve with chips.
